visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a white long-sleeved shirt and denim overalls stands beside a woman in a black dress in a brightly lit indoor hallway. They engage in a lively conversation with expressive facial movements and hand gestures. (2) The scene shifts to a gold-framed insert showing a messy pile of clothes on a wooden chair next to a dining table; the man looks on with a skeptical and frustrated expression. (3) They move to another part of the house where a close-up shows clumps of hair on a light wooden floor, framed like an artwork; the man reacts with exaggerated shock and horror, holding his face in his hands. (4) The duo enters a kitchen where a sink is filled to the brim with dirty baby bottles and dishes; the man points accusingly at the sink while the woman smiles awkwardly. (5) A transition leads to a product showcase of a white Giaretti baby bottle washer; various shots demonstrate bottles being placed inside and the machine operating with digital displays visible. (6) The video transitions to the man demonstrating a black Roborock F25 Ultra floor scrubber in the living room; he moves the device over the wooden floor as steam and lights emanate from the brush head. (7) Finally, the man and woman stand together in the living room, laughing and gesturing towards the floor scrubber as a final gold-framed artwork title appears on the screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 不是洪+0. [Variety]: ??? 藝術大師. (2) [Slogan]: 作品：洋蔥. [Subtitle]: 一層一層的剝開我的心. (3) [Variety]: 嫌惡. [Slogan]: 作品：吶喊. (4) [Variety]: 胎哥鬼. (5) [Slogan]: 作品：排山倒海. [Subtitle]: 高低錯落的奶瓶碗盤. (6) [Variety]: 荒謬. [Logo]: Giaretti. [Slogan]: 全自動洗奶瓶機 (GT-WBR828). (7) [Slogan]: 2025年最新上市!. [Logo]: 石頭科技Roborock. [Slogan]: F25 Ultra 蒸氣x熱水高溫洗烘地機. (8) [Slogan]: 作品：蒙娜麗莎起笑.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 adult male creator and 1 adult female partner/co-star.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The male character wears a white t-shirt under denim overalls and black socks. The female character wears a black midi-length dress and has her hair tied up in a bun.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern residential interior with white walls, wooden flooring, brown wooden doors, and a fully equipped kitchen with white cabinetry and stainless steel fixtures.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy dialogue between a male and female voice, characterized by rapid speech and varied pitch. An upbeat, rhythmic electronic BGM plays continuously in the background. (2) A sharp 'impact' sound effect accompanies the visual transition to the gold-framed segments. The male voice adopts a louder, more dramatic tone of complaint. (3) During the transition to the kitchen, the BGM remains steady while frequent 'pop' and 'whoosh' SFX punctuate the scene cuts. (4) As the product demonstration starts, the male vocal shifts to a clear, professional narration style. Technical SFX such as motor whirring and steaming sounds are layered over the music. (5) The final segment returns to the lively conversational tone with high arousal, ending with a rhythmic musical flourish and a final 'ding' sound effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Demo -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote household cleaning appliances by humorously reframing messy domestic chores as 'unwanted artworks,' then providing efficient technology as the solution.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of features, product naming, logo overlays, and inclusion of model numbers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density editing style typical of social media marketing, combining comedic skits with clear product demonstrations.
